title: Bouncer (ghost)
wikitext:
{{External|rs=Bouncer#The_General's_Shadow}} {{Infobox Monster |name = Bouncer |image = [[File:Bouncer (ghost).png|250px]] |release = [[12 February]] [[2007]] |update = A sq'irk a day... |members = Yes |combat = 160 |size = 2 |examine = Big, mean, dead doggy. |xpbonus = 0 |max hit = 15 |aggressive = Yes |poisonous = No |attack style = [[Stab]] |attack speed = 4 |hitpoints = 120 |att = 145 |str = 145 |def = 145 |mage = 1 |range = 1 |attbns = 0 |strbns = 0 |amagic = 0 |mbns = 0 |arange = 0 |rngbns = 0 |dstab = 0 |dslash = 0 |dcrush = 0 |elementalweaknesstype = Air |elementalweaknesspercent = 15 |dmagic = 0 |drange = 0 |immunepoison = No |immunevenom = No |id = 3508,3509 }} '''Bouncer's ghost''' is the ghost of [[General Khazard]]'s deceased pet [[hellhound]] named [[Bouncer]], which the player killed during the [[Fight Arena]] [[quest]]. It is fought at the end of the [[The General's Shadow]] [[miniquest]], and resides in a hidden area in the [[Goblin Cave]] north of [[Ardougne]] until the player distracts it with a [[Severed leg (The General's Shadow)|severed leg]] and kills Bouncer once more. Despite being a ghost, it is not classified as [[Undead (attribute)|undead]] or [[Spectral (attribute)|spectral]] and as such does not take extra damage from [[Crumble Undead]] or with a [[salve amulet]], and does not award [[Prayer]] experience with the [[ectoplasmator]]. Prayers cannot be used when fighting it, as an evil presence prevents them from activating inside the cave. There is a small area in the south-east corner of the cave that can be used as a [[safespot]], with Bouncer approaching from the north. It will get stuck next to the wall.
